description: Great Expectations-style validation suite for Unified Charity Platform Silver, Gold and DWH layers.

rules: Every Silver table must contain rows.
source_org must be one of food_bank, resala, haya_karima.
Every Gold dimension and fact table must contain rows.
Surrogate keys must not be null.
Business measures must be valid numeric values.
Donation amount must be greater than or equal to zero.
Inventory quantity must be greater than or equal to zero.
Priority score should be between 0 and 100 when available.
SQL Server DWH Gold tables must exist.
DWH Gold tables must contain rows.
DWH Gold key columns must not be null.
